title: Euphoria SMP
body:
This is a lightweight modpack that is focused around Create and addons to give a vanilla+ experience. The main mods focused into this modpack are Create and its addons that extend onto the game for a lot more additions things and automation. Farmer's Delight and its addons have also been implemented into this modpack to extend onto the food aspects of the game. None of these mods are owned by me, thanks to the individuals that own these mods for creating them. Below is the list of mods and libraries in the latest version of this pack.

Starting v2.2.0, this modpack contains two subversions.

> Subversion **"A"** contains only the required mods.
>
> Subversion **"B"** contains recommended mods as well.

We suggest you to install subversion **"B"** unless you know what you are doing.

### Mods:
- Athena
- Chef's Delight
- Chipped
- Clumps
- Corpse
- Crafting Recipes for Create
- Create
  - Create: Connected
  - Create: Copycats+
  - Create: Crafts & Additions
  - Create: Encased
  - Create: Enchantment Industry
  - Create: Slice & Dice
  - Create: Steam 'n' Rails
  - Create: Stuff & Additions
  - Create: The Factory Must Grow
  - Create: Trimmed
- Curios API
- Diagonal Fences
- Explorer's Compass
- Elytra Trims
- Farmer's Delight
  - Butcher's Delight
  - Casualness Delight
  - Corn Delight
  - Crabber's Delight
  - Cuisine Delight
  - End's Delight
  - Festive Delight
  - Miner's Delight
  - Nether's Delight
  - Vegan Delight
- KubeJS
- KubeJS Create
- Nature's Compass
- Ocean's Delight
- Packet Fixer
- Polymorph
- Shulker+
- Simple Voice Chat
- Supplementaries
- Tom's Storage Mod
- TreePlacer
- Twigs

### Libraries:
- Architectury API
- Geckolib
- Kotlin for Forge
- Mysterious Mountain Lib
- Moonlight Lib
- Puzzles Lib
- Resourceful Lib
- Rhino
- YUNG's API

### Mods and Libraries Only on Subversion "B":
- AppleSkin
- Controlling
- Do a Barrel Roll
- Entity Culling
- FerriteCore
- Embeddium
- Just Enough Items
- Radium
- Searchables

This modpack's sole purpose is to make it easier for the members of [Euphoria SMP](https://discord.gg/eNAJBzfheE) to install the mods required by the server. If you choose to use this modpack, be sure to install it on the server you use it with. This modpack does not add any profiles or configs, only the mods listed below.
If you would like to join us: https://discord.gg/eNAJBzfheE
